name: NEW_PATHWAYS_RECENT_YEARS
description: List pathways whose first publication is within the most recent N years (default 3).
cypher:
WITH coalesce($years, 3) AS years
MATCH (pw:Pathway)<-[:IN_PATHWAY]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WITH pw, min(y.year) AS first_year, years
WITH pw, first_year, years, date().year AS current_year
WHERE first_year >= (current_year - years + 1)
RETURN pw.name AS pathway, first_year
ORDER BY first_year DESC, pathway
LIMIT 50;

examples: Which pathways first appeared in the last 3 years?
